use_cases: Landing page hero sections requiring dynamic visual interest
Full-screen background for creative portfolios and showcases
Animated backdrop for marketing and promotional content
Premium visual layer for SaaS product pages
Ambient background for media and entertainment platforms
ai_summary: A dynamic shader background component using Paper Design's LiquidMetal effect with warm amber/orange tones, featuring continuous morphing animation with subtle rotation and scaling. The 8-second breathing animation creates a premium, fluid aesthetic ideal for modern landing pages and hero sections.
